headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire
summary: The U.S. ordered non-emergency government staff to leave Saudi Arabia as the widening Iran war rattled global markets.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Oil surges past $100 per barrel as Iran war rages
summary: Shortly after the surge, U.S. President Donald Trump said on Truth Social that "short term oil prices" are "a very small price to pay".

headline: Asia markets moderate losses after reported Saudi oil release slightly ease prices

headline: Oil prices fall below $100 per barrel on possible stockpile release to address supply disruption
summary: Gulf Arab oil producers are cutting production as they run out of storage space because they can't export through the Strait of Hormuz

headline: Phillips 66 Appoints Howard Ungerleider and Kevin Meyers to Board of Directors
summary: HOUSTON, March 08, 2026--Phillips 66 today announced that it has appointed Howard Ungerleider and Kevin Meyers to serve on the Company’s Board of Directors.

headline: Energy prices will fall when U.S. destroys Iran's ability to attack tankers in Strait of Hormuz: Wright
summary: Gas prices have spiked in the U.S. as oil has jumped to over $90 since the war began in Iran.
